dimension_notes.naming_quality: Naming is very consistent and descriptive (e.g. AppState, IndexManager).
dimension_notes.logic_clarity: The scanner and searcher logic are well-structured and easy to follow.
dimension_notes.type_safety: Excellent use of Rust type system and error handling types.
dimension_notes.contract_coherence: Function signatures match their behavior well.
dimension_notes.error_consistency: Consistent use of the FlashError custom type.
dimension_notes.abstraction_fitness: Abstractions like IndexManager provide good leverage.
dimension_notes.high_level_elegance: The project structure aligns perfectly with the domain of a search engine.
dimension_notes.mid_level_elegance: Clean handoffs between UI, backend, and core engine.
dimension_notes.low_level_elegance: Precise implementation in the scanner and parsers.
dimension_notes.test_strategy: Good unit test coverage in most core modules.
dimension_notes.api_surface_coherence: Coherent API for search and statistics.
dimension_notes.incomplete_migration: No legacy code visible except one minor parser helper.
dimension_notes.design_coherence: Consistent focus on performance and robustness.

issues.suggestion: Remove the unused helper function to reduce code noise.
